mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user WHERE email = #{email} AND password = MD5(#{password})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user ( email, password, name, gender, birthday , phone_number, registered_at, role, login_type ) VALUES(#{email}, MD5(#{password}), #{name}, #{gender}, #{birthday}, #{phone_number}, NOW(), #{role}, 'L')
mapper.select: SELECT tag_id FROM tag WHERE tag_name = #{tagName}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT admin_id AS user_id , email , password FROM admin WHERE email = #{email} AND password = #{password}
SELECT t.tag_name FROM user_tag ut JOIN tag t ON ut.tag_id = t.tag_id WHERE ut.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT email FROM user WHERE name = #{name} AND birthday = #{birthday} AND phone_number = #{phone_number}
SELECT user_id, email FROM user WHERE email = #{email} AND phone_number = #{phone_number}
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET password = MD5(#{tempPw}) WHERE user_id = #{user_id}
